parameters.content:
## Roadmap Communication Planner

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL and YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Feed roadmap items and stakeholder map
3. LLM produces a tailored communication plan (who gets what, when, and in what format)
4. Approval gate before sending to stakeholders
5. Trigger at start of quarter or before major roadmap changes
